CustomField.description: Semicolon-separated list of Opportunity Record Type names to exclude from Account-level rollup calculations. Opportunities matching these Record Types will not count toward Account donation totals, averages, or other rollup fields. Leave blank to include all Record Types.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Opportunity Record Types to exclude when rolling up donation statistics to Accounts. Enter Record Type names separated by semicolons.
CustomField.label: Opp RecTypes Excluded for Account Rollup
